# Controller pace card template

Use this as the short controller reference for live execution.

## Mission identity

- Mission number:
- Mission title:
- Controller:
- Date:

## Keep the mission on intent

- Commander's intent:
- Decisive point:
- Primary fail-forward rule:

## Slow down when

- players need time to regroup or interpret information
- planned friction is already producing useful decisions
- contact intensity is outpacing the approved tempo model
- the next branch trigger has not actually been met

## Apply pressure when

- players have solved the current problem and need the next decision
- approved branch conditions have clearly been met
- delay is removing tension instead of creating it
- command intent is being lost without a bounded intervention

## Do not improvise

- new enemy strength beyond approved escalation limits
- new mission objectives without command approval
- named actor outcomes that are not supported by evidence
- canon-changing consequences that have not been flagged for review

## Record before endex

- major controller interventions
- branch triggers used
- significant deviations from packet
- issues to flag for continuity review
